metadata.description: Autonomous cloud security posture-sweep agents for Tenable Cloud Security — MCP edition and API-token (GraphQL) edition. Critical findings, low-hanging fruits, discover AI risk, and toxic combination (public + critical-VPR-vuln + privileged workloads).

plugins.name: cloud-risk-triage-agent
plugins.description: MCP edition. Four sections — Address critical findings (root MFA, third-party sensitive-data access, public exposure, exposed secrets), Address low-hanging fruits (inactive identities, unused credentials, unused security groups), Discover AI risk (AI asset inventory + model-to-training-data correlation), and Toxic combination (public + critical-VPR-vuln + privileged workloads) — written to a SOC-ready report. Requires the Tenable Cloud Security (tcs) MCP connector.

plugins.name: cloud-risk-triage-agent-api
plugins.description: API-token edition (no MCP). Uses the Tenable Cloud Security public GraphQL API with a Bearer token to run the same checks (critical findings + low-hanging fruits + discover AI risk + toxic combination), mapped to Findings/Entities, and write a SOC-ready report.
